tagline: Track Sales, Debts & Profit • Request Delivery in One Tap
heroSub: The official trader companion for Merkato & neighborhood shops in Addis Ababa.
scanQr: Scan to install on your phone
voiceHint: Tap mic — say amount and product
proBody: Unlimited exports, multi-shop, and priority ZayRide dispatch — 299 ብር/month.
backupHint: Download a JSON copy of your shop data (sales, debts, deliveries, settings). Restore replaces everything on this device — keep files private.
backupConfirmBody: Importing will overwrite transactions, debts, deliveries, and settings on this phone or browser.
alreadySignedIn: Signed in as {{email}}. Continue to the dashboard or go back.
signInHint: Use the demo trader credentials (mock). Replace with real auth when your API is ready.
partnerReadOnlyTx: Partner view is read-only: you can monitor trader activity but cannot add sales, expenses, or dispatch. Switch to Trader to run your shop.
partnerDebtsHint: Partners do not manage customer ዕዳ — that stays with the trader’s books. Toggle off Partner to record or settle debts.
partnerDebtsNetworkStat: In this demo dataset: {{count}} debt records; unpaid total {{amount}} ብር (informational only).
partnerSettingsBody: Shop profile, backup, and restore apply to a single trader device. Switch to Trader to edit your shop or export data. Use Sign out when you are done.
partnerDeliveriesBlurb: Operational view: same routes as traders, plus delivery counts and estimated platform revenue from completed jobs.
partnerFeeLine: Est. platform fee this job: {{amount}} ብር
